title: Una mujer sin cabeza
writer: Luis César Amadori, Luis Martin de San Vicente
actors: Niní Marshall, Francisco Charmiello, Angelina Pagano
plot: In this parody of the horror genre, complete with secret passageways, sinister men, and frightening apparitions, a Gypsy circus performer and a friend flee their troop. They take refuge in a haunted house, where they soon discover...
